title: FMT1 modifier mask documented with TPM2 Part 2 spec cite and explained non-obvious discriminator
description: key.rs verify() FMT1 stripping: the long comment explaining why 'bit 8 clear' is wrong (subject number 1 sets bit 8, so 0x1DB would bypass stripping) and why 'bit 7 set AND bits 15:12 clear' is the correct discriminator is genuinely valuable. It makes a non-obvious, spec-correct implementation decision auditable. Defend if a contributor suggests simplifying to a range check or a simpler mask.
